name: Website lane
description: Define one controlled website change or defect

---

## Mission

What exact customer-facing or repository result must this lane produce?

## Observed evidence

What was directly seen, reproduced, or measured?

## Exact target

Name the page, asset, wording, form behavior, or repository file that owns the problem.

## Protected baseline

What branding, layout, wording, pricing, booking behavior, navigation, or mobile behavior must remain unchanged?

## Acceptance test

What exact test will prove this lane works?

## Current verdict

Use one: **Works / Works partially / Does not work / Unknown until verified**

## Next action

State only the next proven action.
